---
title: "Schedule"
toc: true
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
FOUR COURSES · SIXTEEN WEEKS · EIGHTY LABS
:::
# Schedule
::: {.lead}
A linked index of every lab, every slide deck, and every R script.
:::
:::

The schedule below is a dependency graph, not a rigid calendar.
Dates and pacing are deliberately left blank: work through it at the
speed your week allows, skip labs whose topic you already know, and
revisit the ones that sting. Each row links to three artefacts —
the HTML article for reading, the Reveal.js deck for presenting,
and the plain R script for experimenting.

## Course 1 — Foundations of Biostatistics with R

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Scientific process & research workflow | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | R, RStudio, Quarto, renv toolchain | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | Data types, tidy data, measurement quality | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Import, joins, missingness with dplyr | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | ggplot2 grammar and multi-panel layouts | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | Descriptives and Table 1 with gtsummary | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Probability and Bayes' theorem | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | Diagnostic testing: sensitivity, specificity, LR | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | Discrete distributions: Bernoulli, binomial, Poisson | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | Continuous distributions and Q-Q plots | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Populations, samples, CLT by simulation | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | Bootstrap and permutation | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | Maximum likelihood and standard errors | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | One-sample t and one-proportion | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | Hypothesis testing philosophy | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | Two-sample and paired t; effect sizes | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Two proportions and goodness-of-fit | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | Pearson and Spearman correlation | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | Non-parametric tests | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | Sample size, power, Quarto reporting | [lab](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](course1_foundations/labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](course1_foundations/code/lab_week4_session5.R) |

## Course 2 — Regression, ANOVA & Model Diagnostics

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Correlation vs regression; Model-I/II | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | Simple linear regression | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | Multiple regression: confounding & interaction | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Diagnostics: residuals, leverage, Cook, VIF | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | Robust and weighted regression; HC SEs | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | One-way ANOVA and contrasts | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Two-way / factorial ANOVA | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | RCBD and repeated measures | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | GAMs with mgcv | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | Non-linear regression with nls | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Logistic regression | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | ANCOVA in RCTs | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | Ordinal and multinomial regression | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | Poisson and negative-binomial regression | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | Calibration, discrimination, ROC/AUC, Brier | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | Dichotomisation, change scores, RTM | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Kappa, ICC, Bland-Altman | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | Survival primer: KM, log-rank, Cox | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | Decision curves, NRI/IDI | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | Explanation vs prediction; reporting guidelines | [lab](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](course2_regression/labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](course2_regression/code/lab_week4_session5.R) |

## Course 3 — Study Design, Longitudinal Data & Causal Inference

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Observational designs and STROBE | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | Randomised controlled trials | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | Adaptive, non-inferiority, equivalence trials | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Bench and translational design | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | Power: closed-form and simulation-based | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | MCAR, MAR, MNAR | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Multiple imputation with mice | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | Linear mixed models with lme4 | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | GLMMs and GEE | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | Time series basics | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Time-varying covariates, landmark, immortal-time | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | Competing risks and multistate models | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | DAGs with dagitty | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | Propensity scores and IPTW | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | G-methods, IV, DiD, RDD; HTE | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | Systematic reviews and PRISMA | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Meta-analysis basics | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | Network meta-analysis | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | SIR / SEIR with deSolve | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | Pre-registration and SAPs | [lab](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](course3_design_causal/labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](course3_design_causal/code/lab_week4_session5.R) |

## Course 4 — Modern Statistical Learning & High-Dimensional Biomedicine

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Cross-validation, nested CV, bootstrap | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | Regularisation: ridge, lasso, elastic net | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | PCA, FA, CCA, LDA | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Clustering: k-means, hierarchical, model-based | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | UMAP and t-SNE | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | Trees, random forests, boosting | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Interpretability and SHAP | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | Tabular neural networks with torch | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | Imaging and sequence models intro | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | tidymodels pipelines | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Bayesian thinking; α vs decision error | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | brms / Stan, LOO, hierarchical | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | Biomarker statistics | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | Survival ML | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | Time-dependent Brier, IPA, external validation | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | RNA-seq with DESeq2/edgeR | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Enrichment analysis | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | scRNA-seq with Seurat | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | FDR, knockoffs, replication crisis | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | TRIPOD-AI, fairness, reproducibility at scale | [lab](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](course4_ml_highdim/labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](course4_ml_highdim/code/lab_week4_session5.R) |
